mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.issue_key, i.project_id, p.name AS project_name, i.title, i.status, i.priority, i.assignee, i.due_date, i.description FROM issues i JOIN projects p ON p.id = i.project_id ORDER BY i.id

SELECT i.id, i.issue_key, i.project_id, p.name AS project_name, i.title, i.status, i.priority, i.assignee, i.due_date, i.description FROM issues i JOIN projects p ON p.id = i.project_id WHERE i.id = #{id}

WITH inserted AS ( INSERT INTO issues (issue_key, project_id, title, status, priority, assignee, due_date, description) VALUES (#{issueKey}, #{projectId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{assignee}, #{dueDate}, #{description}) RETURNING id, issue_key, project_id, title, status, priority, assignee, due_date, description ) SELECT i.id, i.issue_key, i.project_id, p.name AS project_name, i.title, i.status, i.priority, i.assignee, i.due_date, i.description FROM inserted i JOIN projects p ON p.id = i.project_id

WITH updated AS ( UPDATE issues SET issue_key = #{request.issueKey}, project_id = #{request.projectId}, title = #{request.title}, status = #{request.status}, priority = #{request.priority}, assignee = #{request.assignee}, due_date = #{request.dueDate}, description = #{request.description} WHERE id = #{id} RETURNING id, issue_key, project_id, title, status, priority, assignee, due_date, description ) SELECT i.id, i.issue_key, i.project_id, p.name AS project_name, i.title, i.status, i.priority, i.assignee, i.due_date, i.description FROM updated i JOIN projects p ON p.id = i.project_id
